command:
echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/verify_audit.py && python3 /tmp/verify_audit.py 2>&1

echo ""
echo "=== COMMIT ==="
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup
git add runtime/journal_runtime.py runtime/memory_runtime.py
git add agents/sakura/JOURNAL.md agents/megabyte/JOURNAL.md
git add agents/sentinel/JOURNAL.md agents/larry/JOURNAL.md
git add agents/remy/JOURNAL.md
git status --short | head -15

git commit -m "Phase 9E.3 Journal Runtime — write read list correct voice-verify audit"

git tag Phase9E3-JournalRuntime

git push origin main && git push origin Phase9E3-JournalRuntime
git push github main && git push github Phase9E3-JournalRuntime

echo ""
echo "=== LOG ==="
git log --oneline -4
git tag -l | tail -6
